parents.subject: LU-18923 osd: move simple debugfs files to sysfs

commit.subject: LU-00000 obdfilter: Debug/Recreate patch
commit.message:
LU-00000 obdfilter: Debug/Recreate patch

Run obdfilter with stopall/setupall to
start in clean state in case there is
a lefover memory from previous test-case

Debug/Recreate patch	- 1

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=obdfilter-survey fstype=zfs
Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 clientdistro=el9.5 serverdistro=el8.10 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-1
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I790492955112961ef267e9b34bdc3cb8427ff938
